title: Why Shinji x Asuka is the only thing that truly works
display_title: Why Shinji x Asuka is the only thing that truly works
wikitext:
[]: Why Shinji x Asuka is the only thing that truly works. Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Oct 28, 2009 1:46 pm this is something i posted in another thread shinjidoggysasuka wrote: Synapsid wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: anyway, Shinji / Asuka

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Oct 28, 2009 1:49 pm Shipping discussions should stay in the fave-couple thread.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Oct 28, 2009 1:51 pm Only two relationships in show we know for sure that are actually capable of working: - Gendo/Yui - series-timeline Misato/Kaji (after all their original romance met not-so-nice end) Now I agree that Asuka is the female counterpart to Shinji. But I wouldn't go as far as to say it would absolutely work... I think it's purposefully left up to viewer, albeit in a certain way that pairing is very canonical

[]: Post by esselfortium » Wed Oct 28, 2009 2:03 pm While I'm a fan of the pairing, this really should stay in the other thread where it and various other possible couples have been discussed to death already and will continue to be until the end of time.

[]: Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Wed Oct 28, 2009 2:06 pm actually, they are the only couple that would completely work out. first off, as hideaki anno has said time and time again, neither Shinji or kaowru are gay. Shinji and Rei wouldn't work out for the obvious reason that Rei is just unresponsive, Shinji would want someone to connect with. Misato is too old for Shinji, and she loves Kaji. for these new Shinji x Kaji freaks, neither Kaji nor Shinji are gay, and Kaji loves Misato.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 28, 2009 2:35 pm
